reviews.review_description: My daughter loves it and has been performing puja for last half hour! She said, she feels like she is in heaven! I couldn't figure it out how and where to pick up the flowers, but she did! :) Couple of suggestions: 1. Please if you can come out with different deities or add in this App the feature to choose a different deity and background. 2. In this App it would be good if a dhun plays in background 3. For any future advanced versions, if I can use the controllers to perform dakshina or have smaller deity sections that a bhakt can visit using controllers!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your suggestions. We are already developing other temples and experiences, I would recommend you to check them too in our Metagod Creator Developer page in Meta Quest Store. Your insights are really helpful and encouraging for our development.

reviews.review_description: It’s refreshing to see this sort of Hindu spiritual content making its way onto the Quest! This app creates a calm, devotional space that feels meaningful and immersive, and the atmosphere and intention really shine through. There are a few areas that could use some polish and fine-tuning, which I’ve shared with the devs, but the core concept is beautiful. Excited to see how it evolves!

developer_response.body:
Thank You for playing and rating our app. We have carefully noted your feedback, and our developers are constantly working to provide best experience for our users. 
Thank You,
From Team Metagod Creator.
